weapons.name: Eye Gouger
weapons.desc: Target can't counterattack for 1 turn

weapons.name: Brass Knuckles
weapons.desc: +2 power on direct attacks

weapons.name: Switchblade
weapons.desc: +1 power, ignores precision rule

weapons.name: Zip Gun
weapons.desc: Can attack any active position, not just adjacent

weapons.name: Crowbar
weapons.desc: +3 power on direct attacks

weapons.name: Chain Whip
weapons.desc: Direct attack also hits adjacent position for 1 damage

weapons.name: Prison Shiv
weapons.desc: +1 power, attack from reserve

weapons.name: Molotov
weapons.desc: Destroy all product on target position

weapons.name: Taser
weapons.desc: Target crew skips next turn

weapons.name: Pipe Bomb
weapons.desc: Deals 3 damage to target and both adjacent positions

weapons.name: Garrote
weapons.desc: Kill without triggering opponent's counterattack abilities

weapons.name: Sawed-Off
weapons.desc: +4 power but weapon is destroyed after use

weapons.name: Body Armor
weapons.desc: Crew survives first lethal hit with 1 HP

weapons.name: Radio Scanner
weapons.desc: Reveal all opponent reserve positions

weapons.name: Lockpick Set
weapons.desc: Steal weapon from adjacent enemy position

weapons.name: Baseball Bat
weapons.desc: +2 power, destroy target's weapon on hit

weapons.name: Caltrops
weapons.desc: Enemy crew moving to this position takes 2 damage

weapons.name: Rifle Scope
weapons.desc: Can attack opponent's reserve positions

weapons.name: Smoke Grenade
weapons.desc: This position can't be targeted for 1 turn

weapons.name: Wire Cutters
weapons.desc: Remove all cash from target position (seize the funds)

weapons.name: Knuckle Duster
weapons.desc: +1 power, successful kill draws another weapon

weapons.name: Machete
weapons.desc: +2 power, intimidate: adjacent enemies lose 1 power

weapons.name: Suppressor
weapons.desc: Attack doesn't alert opponent (no counter next turn)

weapons.name: Hip Flask
weapons.desc: Restore crew to full power once

weapons.name: Fake Badge
weapons.desc: Funded attack flip threshold reduced by 2
